sourceRom: rom/宝可梦命运（培训屋bug修复）.gba
notes: Profile generated from this ROM's CFRU config pointers. Party, three save bag categories, and existing safe save-box slots have ROM/sample evidence; live box, empty-slot creation, and trainer writes stay disabled.

romVerified: species_name_bytes.tsv ids 1..1199 from Destiny species-name table 0x1A029E8
species_nickname_bytes.tsv ids 1..1199 from Destiny species-name table 0x1A029E8
item_effects.tsv ids are derived from ROM item hold-effect bytes
machine_moves.tsv from active table 0x45A80C (58 u16 entries; TM17=Protect, TM48=Work Up)
species_evolution_names.tsv names all extended targets referenced by the Destiny evolution table
species_level_moves.tsv from pointer table 0x1A0E0BC (packed u16 level/move entries; 0x1A0E0C0 is species 2)
front sprites from 0x1A0F378 and normal palettes from 0x1A13E78
ability_descriptions.tsv decoded from those Destiny pointers/raw bytes
maps.tsv/map_warps.tsv topology from map group table 0x3526A8 (43 groups)
experience.tsv levels 0..100 match ROM bytes at 0x253AE4
displayHints: species.tsv uses complete raw-name byte matches where available; zero-base-stat and raw unused slots are omitted
English engine form names are exposed as Chinese base names plus Chinese species_forms.tsv labels while raw bytes remain preserved
moves.tsv has 492 names matched by complete raw bytes, 3 additional names decoded from Destiny bytes, and explicit unresolved labels for the remainder
abilities.tsv uses Destiny raw bytes and cross-checked ability candidates; all 152 rows have display names
items.tsv combines Destiny raw names and item-description evidence; all rows now have display names and raw bytes remain preserved
item_effects.tsv uses generic effect labels until hold-effect names are decoded
ability_descriptions.tsv is decoded from Destiny ROM pointers and raw text bytes
map_sections.tsv names are generated region labels until Destiny map section text is decoded
species_forms.tsv maps Unown, Riolu/Lucario, Mega, corrosion, Alolan, and other evolution-target forms
disabledOrPlaceholder: 85 map-section display names remain generated labels
76 nonzero item-effect names remain generic labels
